prompt: Create an explanatory slide (ponchi-e diagram) for Momotaro that fuses the gentle atmosphere of "Irasutoya" with the overwhelming information density of "Kasumigaseki slides".
promptEn: Create an explanatory slide (ponchi-e diagram) for Momotaro that fuses the gentle atmosphere of "Irasutoya" with the overwhelming information density of "Kasumigaseki slides".
promptZh: 创建一个讲解型 Slides（ponchi-e diagram），主题为 Momotaro，将“Irasutoya”的柔和氛围与“霞关风格 Slides”极高的信息密度完美融合。
